title: Good Things Take Time
lesson: Some good things take time and patience to grow.
prompts: Place the person from the input image into a sunny backyard garden in the morning. The person from the input image stands on the far left in the mid-ground, holding a small clay pot and a seed packet, facing the camera with a curious smile and the face fully visible. In the right foreground, {GENDER_F_AGE_70_RACE_ASIAN} kneels by a garden bed, gesturing toward the soil. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm sunlight, soft storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The person from the input image kneels alone in the garden pressing a tiny seed into the soil of a clay pot, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, with a focused, gentle expression. A small gardening trowel beside them, warm morning light, soft storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The person from the input image peers closely into the clay pot of bare brown soil with no sprout yet, facing the camera with a disappointed, impatient expression and the face clearly visible. Soft daytime light in the garden, soft storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

A storybook garden scene. The person from the input image stands on the far left in the mid-ground, holding a small watering can, facing the camera with a listening expression and the face fully visible. In the right foreground, {GENDER_F_AGE_70_RACE_ASIAN} smiles warmly and points gently to the pot and the sky, as if explaining that plants need time. Eye-level medium-wide shot, golden light, soft storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The person from the input image kneels by the clay pot where a tiny green sprout has just appeared, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, eyes wide with delight. A small watering can tips a gentle stream of water. Bright morning light, soft storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The person from the input image stands on the far left holding up the clay pot now with a blooming yellow flower, facing the camera with a proud, joyful smile and the face fully visible. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_70_RACE_ASIAN} claps and beams with pride. Warm sunny garden, heart-warming soft storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
